records.ety: [OE. aumener, aulmener, OF. almosnier, aumosnier, F. aumnier, fr. OF. almosne, alms, L. eleemosyna. See Alms.]

defs: One who distributes alms, esp. the doles and alms of religious houses, almshouses, etc.; also, one who dispenses alms for another, as the almoner of a prince, bishop, etc.
A social worker in a hospital.
An official in a hospital whose job it is to calculate how much a patient must pay for treatment.
